steps.title: Identify the comparison requirement
steps.content: The claim asks for “a comparison using natural imagery to convey the mental state.” We need a quotation where a natural image is compared to Demetrio's thoughts.

steps.title: Apply the comparison to the choices
steps.content: B shows “Memories crowded and buzzed through his brain like bees about a hive” — the “like bees about a hive” comparison portrays his mental state as chaotic and swarming. The other three either lack the explicit comparison or present nature scenes unrelated to his mind. That matches choice B — B is correct.
